Different models make different mistakes, so combining them produces more reliable outputs than any single model alone. **Reduced hallucination & error detection** — When models disagree, signals uncertainty; when they agree, increases confidence. This lets you flag unreliable outputs route uncertain queries human review stronger models. **Cost efficiency through intelligent routing** — Route simple queries cheaper/faster models and reserve expensive frontier models hard problems. Reduces token spend and latency matching inference cost task complexity.
